mapper.select: SELECT * FROM file_tbl_storage_node WHERE storage_type = #{storageType} AND enabled = 1
SELECT * FROM file_tbl_storage_node WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND enabled = 1 AND node_status = 1
SELECT * FROM file_tbl_storage_node WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND enabled = 1 AND node_status = 1 AND health_status = 1 ORDER BY priority ASC, weight DESC
SELECT * FROM file_tbl_storage_node WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND enabled = 1 AND node_status = 1 AND health_status = 1 ORDER BY priority ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM file_tbl_storage_node WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND enabled = 1 AND node_status = 1 ORDER BY weight DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE file_tbl_storage_node SET health_status = #{healthStatus}, last_health_check = NOW() WHERE node_id = #{nodeId}
UPDATE file_tbl_storage_node SET enabled = #{enabled}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE node_id = #{nodeId}
